name: agent-collab-workspace
description: 5 skills for multi-agent collaboration on the same task: task-splitter (decompose + classify subtasks), output-reconciler (synthesize N agent outputs), debate (adversarial review), shared-memory (persistent decisions across sessions), acceptance-gate (pre-merge checklist). Composes with codex-delegate + gemini-delegate via .ai/codex_task_*.md handoff format and reads result.json contracts.
